title: His Words To Christ Going To The Cross.
content:
When Thou wast taken, Lord, I oft have read,
    All Thy disciples Thee forsook and fled.
    Let their example not a pattern be
    For me to fly, but now to follow Thee.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "His Words To Christ Going To The Cross."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
